reviewers.name: implementation-contract
reviewers.focus: Map issues #4-#19 to code paths and docs.
reviewers.finding: All issue categories have corresponding implementation and test/doc evidence.

reviewers.name: data-preservation
reviewers.focus: Ensure redaction, final transcription, delete cleanup, and assistant context do not lose or leak sensitive meeting state.
reviewers.finding: Final transcription now preserves existing speaker labels when replacement speaker events are missing, assistant contexts are server-side and redacted, delete cleanup handles ambiguous IDs explicitly, and secret redaction is shared across runtime paths.

reviewers.name: operations-and-ux
reviewers.focus: Check Kabosu defaults, Japanese visible text, wake profile boundaries, and WebSocket contract alignment.
reviewers.finding: Bot defaults now use Kabosu/Japanese, wake-stt and TTS are opt-in profiles, transcript.finalized is documented and consumed as a REST refresh signal, and transcript.mutable is retained only as deprecated inbound compatibility.

required_follow_up: Record hash-bound human approval for the final non-.pipeline diff before opening a PR.
Run live meeting E2E after deployment with owner-scoped VEXA_API_KEY and real wake credentials.
